name: Game Boy Advance
description: Nintendo's 32-bit handheld platform and successor to the Game Boy Color. Known for portable 2D games, SNES-style experiences, and strong Nintendo franchise entries.

eras.title: Launch and SNES-Portable Era
eras.description: Early period defined by portable 16-bit-style games, SNES ports, and handheld sequels.

eras.title: Original Handheld Peak Era
eras.description: The platform's strongest period of original handheld entries, RPGs, action games, and Nintendo experiments.
